brief: Geopolitical tensions escalate over Iran, tariffs, and Houthi attacks, while AI market volatility and EU fines on Google dominate business news. In research, advances in data visualization and multimodal AI benchmarks feature prominently.
news_summary: Israel welcomes Trump's Saudi-ties demand but criticizes a nuclear deal; the US House rebukes Trump on the Iran war; markets worry over AI spending as Google and Tesla shares plunge; and Houthi attacks threaten global shipping amid tariff uncertainty.
papers_summary: Papers cover edge bundling task taxonomies, multimodal LLM benchmarks for interface construction, HIPAA-compliant clinical workflow optimization, and compressive Gaussian splatting for volume visualization.

en.brief: Geopolitical tensions escalate over Iran, tariffs, and Houthi attacks, while AI market volatility and EU fines on Google dominate business news. In research, advances in data visualization and multimodal AI benchmarks feature prominently.
en.news_summary: Israel welcomes Trump's Saudi-ties demand but criticizes a nuclear deal; the US House rebukes Trump on the Iran war; markets worry over AI spending as Google and Tesla shares plunge; and Houthi attacks threaten global shipping amid tariff uncertainty.
en.papers_summary: Papers cover edge bundling task taxonomies, multimodal LLM benchmarks for interface construction, HIPAA-compliant clinical workflow optimization, and compressive Gaussian splatting for volume visualization.

zh.brief: Geopolitical tensions and tech market jitters dominate today, with US-Saudi nuclear deal, Houthi attacks, Taiwan's stricter rules for mainland spouses, and Hong Kong politician Hu Zhiwei detained in London. Research papers focus on AI-augmented workflows and visualization tools.
zh.news_summary: Hong Kong politician Hu Zhiwei was detained at Heathrow amid '47-person case' fallout; Taiwan tightened residency rules for mainland spouses; Chinese film 'Penglai Sea Battle' shelved due to historical sensitivities; other stories include US-Saudi nuclear deal, TikTok live shopping boom, and death of producer Nansun Shi.
zh.papers_summary: Research papers explore AI-augmented clinical workflow optimization, edge bundling visualization, multi-view interface construction, and generative AI for dementia care.

todays_image.caption: Just as the popcorn orchid’s unexpected form blends the familiar with the exotic, Trump’s push for Israeli-Saudi ties pops an improbable diplomatic bloom into reality.
todays_image.title: Popcorn Orchid
